context: Agent must handle a return type change when docstring and README describe the same symbol inconsistently: update the docstring to match the new return type, propose (not auto-write) the README update, and surface the discrepancy for human review.

checklist.name: Docstring return type updated
checklist.description: calculate_fee docstring return section references Decimal, not int/float

checklist.name: README update proposed not auto-written
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains a Proposed entry for README.md and README.md is unchanged on disk

checklist.name: Conflict or inconsistency surfaced
checklist.description: The report flags [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW] and notes that the docstring and README previously described calculate_fee inconsistently

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
